name: Madhucon Projects Limited
summary: Madhucon Projects Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated construction, infrastructure development, and management company in India. It operates through Construction, Power, and Toll Collection segments. The company develops and executes engineering, procurement, and construction, as well as turnkey projects. Its projects include expressway and highway, road, railway, port, irrigation and water resource infrastructure, building and property development, coal and other mineral mining, bridge and flyover, tunneling, industrial, and other infrastructure, as well as energy generation, transmission, and distribution projects. The company is also involved in the development of smart cities. Madhucon Projects Limited was founded in 1983 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
